name: Undercroft Warriors
short_description: Crush the forces of hell and get a high score in this addictive, action-packed, arcade-inspired twin-stick shooter!
detailed_description:
The forces of hell are here!

Why? Dunno.

How? I don't think it matters.

All that matters is that you gotta fight them, right now!

In this game, you play as one of 6 heroes fighting off increasingly large hordes of enemies! Every agent has weapons and abilities unique to them, and you have to use them to them to their fullest abilities to get as high of a score as possible! The faster you kill enemies, the higher your score multiplier gets! But don't let off the pressure, because if you do, you'll get swarmed and overwhelmed by the forces of hell!

  • An addictive gameplay loop! You'll always want just one more go!
  • A pixel perfect artstyle! Lovingly crafted for your viewing pleasure!
  • Truly distinct characters! You won't ever get bored with these guys!
  • Play how you want! Supports both keyboard and mouse, and gamepads!



So, are you up to the task?

name: Rosalie
short_description: A chaotic 2-player co-op road trip. Share the controls of a pedal car as tourists: sit on the left to turn left, sit on the right to turn right! Coordination is key!
detailed_description:
Embark on a quirky road trip as a tourist in a two-seater pedal car! Traverse diverse landscapes where you’ll find yourself taking all the wrong paths. Explore your surroundings and take photos along the path. Solo or as a pair, will you reach the journey's end... or will you roll back down a hill, questioning the very meaning of life?

Communication is key! Each player can only pull the steering lever on their side.
Stronger together. Pedaling and braking is more effective when both pilots are coordinated. 
When things get frantic, don't panic. Trying to pull the handbrake or reverse at the same time can lead to disaster!

You steer left, I steer right, what could possibly go wrong? Everything. From mistimed turns to frantic braking, the road to the finish line is paved with hysterical arguments and near-misses. When you are not in sync and your sense of direction fails, your peaceful seaside stroll quickly turns into complete disaster.

While this journey is designed for two, you can absolutely take on the road alone. In solo mode, you’ll have full control of the steering and be the only captain on board... but that also means you’ve only got yourself to blame when things go sideways!

Can't reach the finish line? Don't worry about it. Stop the quadricycle, take a deep breath, and admire the landscape. The journey might be a catastrophe, but at least the postcard will look great.

name: WonderLang Polyglot
short_description: Learn languages through immersive quests, interactive dialogues, and spaced repetition combats. Help a young hero lift a magical curse by mastering a new language. Customize your learning experience and explore a vibrant world filled with unique characters. Start your journey to fluency today!
detailed_description:
Welcome to WonderLang Polyglot, the ultimate edition of WonderLang that lets you learn multiple languages in one RPG. Immerse yourself in captivating quests, interactive dialogues, and fun puzzles designed to make language learning seamless and enjoyable.

This page is for the Polyglot version of WonderLang. It includes all current WonderLang language campaigns in a single package:

French, Spanish (Spain), German, Portuguese (Brazilian), Italian, Korean, Japanese, and Mandarin Chinese. English is coming in  February 2026. New languages will be added through regular free updates.

Learn your target language from the following base (starting) languages: English, French, Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese, Korean, Chinese, Japanese, Dutch, Indonesian, Polish, Russian, Ukrainian, and Arabic.

Switch freely between languages, experiment with different campaigns, or follow several languages in parallel. WonderLang Polyglot is perfect for curious learners and aspiring polyglots who want to explore more than one language.

Play the Demo directly in your browser (no install) on our website:

WonderLang weaves language into the core of its adventure and narrative. Get immersed in WonderLang as you Explore, Fight, Converse, and Investigate using your target language. Every quest and interaction becomes meaningful practice in the language you choose.

More affordable, more engaging, and way more fun than any subscription-based language learning app!

WonderLang is designed for beginner and lower-intermediate language learners, allowing you to dive into each campaign without prior knowledge of the target language. While the game does not aim to fully replace traditional language courses, it provides an immersive and enjoyable way to practice new languages gradually as you play.

Key Features

All Languages in One Adventure

  • Access all current WonderLang campaigns: French, Spanish (Spain), German, Portuguese (Brazilian), Italian, Korean, Japanese, and Mandarin Chinese.

  • Get future languages through regular updates at no extra cost.

  • Change your target language at any time and experience the same world through different linguistic lenses.

Immersive Learning for Each Language

  • Learn practical French, Spanish, German, Portuguese, Italian, Korean, and Japanese through every conversation, quest, and puzzle.

  • More than 45 hours of combined learning and gameplay per language campaign.

  • Multiple difficulty modes to adapt the game for very beginners and early-level learners (A1–A2 for European languages, and dedicated modes for Korean, Japanese and Chinese).

Engaging Storyline Across All Languages

  • Follow the journey of a young hero who must learn their target language to lift a magical curse from their brother.

  • Explore vibrant towns, uncover secrets, and build friendships by interacting with over 60 unique NPCs in the language you are currently learning.

Learning as a Gameplay Mechanic

  • Solve puzzles and complete quests by forming sentences, understanding dialogues, and choosing the right expressions.

  • Practice building sentences and pronunciation with speech recognition challenges (where available).

  • Use in-game tools such as a dictionary and contextual help to support your learning without breaking immersion.

Spaced Repetition Combat Challenges

  • Engage in language-based combat where correct answers power up your attacks and skills.

  • Combat encounters are designed using the spaced repetition principle to reinforce vocabulary and grammar and improve long term retention.

Real World Context Practice

  • Apply your skills in everyday scenarios: buying groceries, ordering food, asking for directions, or making appointments.

  • Experience useful vocabulary and grammar in real world inspired contexts to build confidence and fluency.

Customizable Learning Experience

  • Adjust difficulty settings in each language campaign to make your experience more relaxed or more challenging.

  • Set daily goals and earn rewards for reaching them, helping you build a consistent, gamified study routine.

A Rich, Interactive World to Revisit in Many Languages

  • Explore diverse locations that introduce language-specific vocabulary and grammar patterns for each target language.

  • Replay your favorite areas in a different language to see how your understanding grows and to compare expressions across languages.

  • Participate in mini games like crosswords, memory games, and charades to vary your practice and keep learning fresh.

Korean Campaign: Levels and Hangul Support

  • Play the Korean campaign with modes tuned for very beginners and TOPIK I learners.

  • Use a dedicated Hangul module (optional if you already know the alphabet).

  • Type Korean with a graphical Korean keyboard and multiple input modes (phonetic typing or direct Hangul mapping).

Japanese Campaign: JLPT Focus and Reading Options

  • Play the Japanese campaign with difficulty tuned for very beginners, JLPT N5, and JLPT N4.

  • Learn kana with a skippable hiragana & katakana module and use a graphical Japanese keyboard with phonetic and direct character input modes.

  • Pick between kana-only, top 110 kanji (read the 110 most common kanji and the rest in kana) and full kanji text, enable furigana (small kana showing kanji pronunciation), and learn to draw characters with on-screen drawing practice.

Chinese Campaign: Pinyin and Hanzi Support

  • Start with a dedicated pinyin module that teaches pronunciation, and tones step by step. You can play it at your own pace or skip it entirely if you already know pinyin.

  • Choose between different input modes: type Chinese using pinyin input, or select characters directly for precise answers and exercises.

  • Pick between pinyin-only, top 110 hanzii (read the 110 most common hanzi and the rest in pinyin) and full hanzi text, enable ruby pinyin (small text showing hanzi pronunciation), and learn to draw characters with on-screen drawing practice.

WonderLang can be played with a mouse and keyboard, mouse only, or keyboard only.

It also plays great on the Steam Deck with an official control layout.

Play the Demo directly in your browser (no install) on our website:

supported_languages:
English, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Dutch, Indonesian, Japanese*, Korean*, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil*, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Ukrainian, Arabic
*languages with full audio support

name: BAIONLENJA
short_description: Use the most overpowered and skill based movement mechanics of all time to explore the vast and interconnected research facility, where a mysterious fossil grants you unimaginable power and mobility. B-Hop, Rocket Jump and Air Strafe to uncover the secrets of the BAIONLENJA corporation.
detailed_description:
Speedrun Inspired Movement

BAIONLENJA is an atmospheric FPS where you combine the most overpowered and skill based movement mechanics of all time. Inspired by Source Engine movement tricks, you explore the research facility with powerful versions of B-Hopping, Rocket Jumping and Airstrafing. No earlier experience is needed: Audio and Visual feedback will teach you each technique until you feel like a speedrunner.

STORY

Fossil of an unknown creature was discovered by the BAIONLENJA corporation. Once they began to disturb the fossil, a dormant consciousness within lashed out with disastrous consequences. Researchers soon realized that the brain of the fossil is still intact; holding schematics of strange machines called MECHANOIDS and memories of a time beyond ours.

You do not know who or what you are, but you can hear the fossil calling out to you, beckoning you to venture into the undersea facility of the BAIONLENJA corporation.

The fossil calls you by the name: SPIRIT.

MOVEMENT

  • B-Hopping (Autohop with visual & audio feedback)

  • Air Strafing (Same as in Source, but acceleration is cranked way up)

  • Blade Jumping (Melee Rocket jumping with no self-damage or ammo)

  • Surfing Ramps/Trimping (Combine with B-Hopping and Blade Jumping for huge jumps)

  • No speed caps or limits (Go as fast as your skill allows)

    Easy to learn with infinite skill potential. BAIONLENJA will teach you or sharpen your existing skills with specially tuned values to reward skill expression and allow truly insane speeds once you master the movement.

EXPLORATION

  • Unique aesthetic calling back to the ps2 era sound and graphic design.

  • Explore the vast and interconnected facility

  • Fight weird and terrifying enemies such as the MECHANOIDS

  • Unlock hidden secrets and new areas with keycards

  • Find upgrades and new movement abilities

  • Discover the deepest lore

  • Press F to SCREAM

COMBAT

  • Weird and unique enemy designs

  • Physics based combat with high damage combos

  • Damage scales with speed and hitting Airshots is a guaranteed critical hit

  • Juggle your enemies or yourself

  • Every movement ability has built in synergy with melee and ranged combat

SOUND & MUSIC

  • Breakbeat, Jungle, DnB all in the style of the early 2000’s

  • Sound effects created with reverence to Source era with extra raw oomph

  • Plenty of fun references for those who pay attention to sounds effects in games

COMMUNITY

  • Finnish solo developer with a passionate community

  • Join the Discord for feedback, feature testing, devlogs and sneak peeks for upcoming content

  • I’m very open to feedback so this is a great time to get your voice heard!

name: Grumpy Gaffer
short_description: Join Mr. Gaffer on his mission to protect the peace of his home in this dynamic strategy game. Test your wits and reflexes as you face intense waves of enemies, and compete in thrilling mini-games against other players.
detailed_description:
After a long and laborious life, Mr. Gaffer just wants to spend his days playing sudoku, far away from anything that bothers him. But his peace is constantly interrupted by his annoying neighbors, so he'll have to face one last battle.

It's time to clone, mutate, and scare them all away!

Help Mr. Gaffer defend the peace of his home in this strategy game where your knowledge and agility will be necessary to face frantic waves of annoying invaders.

Features:

  • Gameplay: Very simple mechanics of drag, drop, and tap.

  • Characters: 20 characters with unique abilities.

  • Power-ups: Around 20 different power-ups to help you progress through the levels.

  • Stages: 3 completely different stages with unique features, for a total of 90 levels!

  • Endless Mode: In this mode, you can play dynamically generated levels. How far will you go?

  • Nightmare Mode: Ultra-challenging levels where your skills will be tested to the max.

  • Smash Storm: A dynamic and fun minigame where you can directly smash the invaders.

  • Sudoku: To keep Mr. Gaffer happy, we’ve included a fully functional sudoku game where you can customize the difficulty and earn extra rewards.

  • Coliseum: Want to prove you're the best? Compete weekly to reach the highest score and get rewards!

  • Gallery: A complete catalog where you can get to know each of the characters and power-ups in-depth, which will assist you in battle.

And this is just the beginning. Stay tuned for future updates where you’ll be able to meet more characters, explore new scenarios, and enjoy new game modes.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil

name: Juufuutei Raden™'s Guide for Pixel Museum
short_description: Solve the puzzle and complete the art! "Pixel Puzzle" that lets you experience art and culture with Juufuutei Raden.
detailed_description:
Curator Raden will guide you through the museum!

A VTuber from hololive DEV_IS, "Juufuutei Raden" from ReGLOSS, will guide you through the museum as the curator!

The entire game world, including Curator Raden and the museum, is depicted in "pixel art".

Please take a look at Curator Raden, who moves in an adorable way!

You can enjoy Dot Art & Curator Raden's commentary!

The puzzle is a "Pixel Puzzle" where the illustration is completed by solving it.

The main puzzles are based on themes related to arts, crafts, and culture.

In addition to enjoying the completed "Dot Art", you can also enjoy explanations of artworks with voice commentary by Curator Raden.

Story

Curator Raden has finally opened the long-awaited museum.

However, looking at the exhibition space, it seems the essential artworks are missing.

"This museum is a hands-on exhibition. As you solve the puzzles, they are completed as 'art'!"

Join Curator Raden as she takes you on a tour of the museum to complete Dot Art!

Game Features

- Play at your own pace with "Pixel Puzzle"

This is a puzzle with simple rules that can be solved by using the vertical and horizontal numbers as clues.

With a detailed tutorial, even beginners can easily enjoy the puzzles.

Various assist functions are implemented to ensure smooth gameplay.

*The assist function can also be turned off.

- Types and number of puzzles

IIn addition to arts and crafts, it will also includes many puzzles related to Juufuutei Raden!

You can also enjoy the illustrated puzzles, reimagined from previous streamed content.

A wide range of puzzle sizes are available, from "5x5" to "40x30".

150 standard pixel puzzles, where each puzzle completes a single illustration.

10 special puzzles, where multiple puzzles come together to create a large illustration.

The total number of puzzles is over 300, offering a generous volume!

Basics of How to Play Pixel Puzzle

＜Juufuutei Raden＞Profile

■ Juufuutei Raden / 儒烏風亭らでん

“Care to join me on a journey through a tale?”

A grandma's girl who covers herself in both tradition and revolution, and sees big dreams in the rakugo world.

She loves arts and culture of all kinds—new and old, Eastern and Western.

She visits museums so often that she is left penny-pinching the rest of the time. It is most certainly not due to her frequent purchases of alcohol.

Through her encounter with rakugo, she has come to enjoy public speaking more than ever, and she is fervishly writing up her own skits.

name: Blackjack Roulette
short_description: Blackjack meets roulette in a deadly duel. Lose a hand, pull the trigger. Use powerful cards to outsmart opponents in 1v1 battles, or defeat the Clown to escape. Win or die.
detailed_description:
You've been kidnapped by a deranged clown and forced into a deadly game. In a decaying execution chamber, the only way to survive is to defeat all your opponents...

"Blackjack Roulette" is a roguelike card game that combines blackjack with Russian roulette. Build a unique deck of trump cards to face eight twisted opponents, or outsmart real players in intense 1v1 duels. Every hand is a life-or-death gamble. Will you survive to face the Joker?

Engage in a twisted version of the classic 21-point duel. The loser must pick up a revolver and pull the trigger...

Draw and play special cards that can completely turn the tables—force your opponent to draw, peek at hidden cards, or even swap out bullets in the gun. Outsmart your enemies and drive them to their doom.

From the short-tempered "Punk-ass Thug" to the unpredictable "Bankrupt Blowhard," you must defeat 8 brutal opponents until you face the ultimate boss, the deranged Clown, in your bid for survival.

Will you outwit death, or become its next victim?

Test your skills against real players in intense 1v1 online duels. Only the sharpest minds will survive and emerge victorious.

This is not just a game; it's a survival experiment.
about_the_game:
You've been kidnapped by a deranged clown and forced into a deadly game. In a decaying execution chamber, the only way to survive is to defeat all your opponents...

"Blackjack Roulette" is a roguelike card game that combines blackjack with Russian roulette. Build a unique deck of trump cards to face eight twisted opponents, or outsmart real players in intense 1v1 duels. Every hand is a life-or-death gamble. Will you survive to face the Joker?

Engage in a twisted version of the classic 21-point duel. The loser must pick up a revolver and pull the trigger...

Draw and play special cards that can completely turn the tables—force your opponent to draw, peek at hidden cards, or even swap out bullets in the gun. Outsmart your enemies and drive them to their doom.

From the short-tempered "Punk-ass Thug" to the unpredictable "Bankrupt Blowhard," you must defeat 8 brutal opponents until you face the ultimate boss, the deranged Clown, in your bid for survival.

Will you outwit death, or become its next victim?

Test your skills against real players in intense 1v1 online duels. Only the sharpest minds will survive and emerge victorious.

This is not just a game; it's a survival experiment.
supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean

name: Cursedland
short_description: Step into Cursedland, a 2D indie action platformer where every jump, movement, and decision truly matters. This is a game built around precision, reflexes, and mastery, challenging players to push their skills to the limit while navigating a world filled with chaos, humor, and surreal surprises.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Cursedland! It's a blood-pumping, action-filled platformer experience bursting to the brim with humor, chaos, and memes.

Cursedland is a 2D indie action platformer that combines extreme precision, absurd humor, and constant chaos. Designed for players who enjoy challenging platform games, Cursedland blends classic mechanics with a modern approach and a strong, distinctive identity.

In Cursedland, every jump matters. You will navigate floating platforms, avoid deadly traps, and fight eccentric enemies as you progress through a surreal world filled with humorous references and unpredictable situations. The game tests your reflexes, movement control, and ability to adapt.

Your mission is to escape the cursed kingdom of Cursedland, using precision, strategy, and fast reflexes while protecting a mysterious mask that shields you from the corrupting power that dominates this strange world.

KEY FEATURES OF CURSEDLAND:

  • 2D action platformer that combines speed, precision, and absurd humor into an intense and rewarding experience.

  • Every movement counts: level design focused on precision, rhythm, and mastery.

  • Three playable levels in this demo, packed with challenging obstacles that will test your skill and patience.

  • Original and unique enemies, each with attack patterns you must learn to survive.

  • Retro-inspired art style with a modern twist, blending nostalgic visuals with an extravagant presentation.

  • Simple but demanding controls, centered around movement mastery and strategic play.

Cursedland is ideal for fans of hard platformer games, indie action games, and experiences where skill, challenge, and humor go hand in hand.

name: R.A.T#200
short_description: A stealth-based survival thriller where you play as an experimental rat trapped in a laboratory. Hide, observe, and use the environment to escape without being detected.
detailed_description:
Escape the Mysterious Lab

Rat #200 is a stealth point and click game where you must quietly navigate through a mysterious laboratory. Solve puzzles to acquire tools to escape.

Be Quiet!

The scientist is always listening. Be quiet, or else…
about_the_game:
Escape the Mysterious Lab

Rat #200 is a stealth point and click game where you must quietly navigate through a mysterious laboratory. Solve puzzles to acquire tools to escape.

Be Quiet!

The scientist is always listening. Be quiet, or else…

name: Caribbean Crashers
short_description: Caribbean Crashers is a fast paced pirate strategy game where you control your own ship and fire cannonballs at enemy vessels to secure victory!
detailed_description: Caribbean Crashers is a fast paced pirate strategy game where you control your own ship and fire cannonballs at enemy vessels to secure victory! Master the art of naval combat as you outsmart your opponents in intense, ship-to-ship battles. With strategic thinking and quick reflexes, it's up to you to conquer the seas and become the ultimate pirate.

Master the art of naval combat as you outsmart your opponents in intense, ship-to-ship battles. name: Teddy's Haven - A Fantasy Inspired Shop Simulator
short_description: Teddy’s Haven is a cozy shop sim filled with magic and charm. Sell over 400 items, decorate with 250+ decorations, and create the shop of your dreams. Meet mythical creatures, level up your skills, harvest the land, and uncover the peaceful wonders of life on Ursa.
detailed_description:
An enchanted shop sim at the edge of a magical world.
Created In Loving Dedication To The Memory Of My Best Friend Teddy Bear.

Welcome to Teddy’s Haven. 

Welcome to a cozy, magical shop simulator set on the enchanting island of Ursa. Run your store your way and sell what you harvest, craft, or discover. And enjoy the freedom to decorate freely across your shop, home, and the wilds beyond.

Level up naturally as you play, grow magical crops, and take part in daily events that bring the island to life. With over 250 decorations, 400 items to sell, and no pressure, every day is yours to enjoy at your own pace.

Ursa, A World of Calm and Wonder

Ursa is a gentle land filled with peace, memories, and mythical spirits. Your shop is a safe haven of supplies for travelers and magical beings alike. The land is rich and vibrant. You can harvest resources, care for its creatures, and meet friendly creatures along the way. In Ursa there is no conflict, only warmth and calm. This is your relaxing world to make your own.

Key Features:

  • Manage Your Magical Shop – Create the cozy shop you’ve always wanted. With changing seasons, daily surprises, and rewarding leveling systems, your shop grows alongside you. No rush, no stress, just a magical rhythm all your own.

  • Decorate Across Ursa – Over 250 decorations to decorate freely across your shop, home, and the island’s landscapes. With near-limitless placement freedom, express your style and bring every corner of Ursa to life.

  • A Wide Variety of Goods to Keep Your Shelves Full – Stock your shop with over 400 items gathered, grown, or traded across Ursa.

  • Skill Systems – Your skills grow naturally as you run your shop. Stock shelves faster, harvest more berries, and see your abilities improve with each task. Leveling up rewards you for doing what you love, at your own pace.

  • Crafting – Enjoy simple, stress-free crafting that doesn’t keep you waiting. Place your items and return the next day to find something special created. Always growing, crafting will expand with new features and more complex options in future updates.

  • Farming – Farming has arrived in the land of Ursa! Unlock new contracts that allow you to plant and nurture magical crops, each with unique Aether-infused variations. Grow, harvest, and fill your shop with wondrous goods born from the earth and touched by magic.

  • Unique and Magical Employees – Hire magical stockers and cashiers who keep your shop running smoothly. Whether you’re decorating, relaxing, or out exploring the world, they’ll reliably care for your haven as if it were their own.

  • Simplified Inventory Management – Too busy to sort through a warehouse of items? Open your “bag of everything” and stock shelves directly, hassle-free. Spend less time managing and more time enjoying your shop.

  • Exploration – Wander the ever-expanding world of Ursa at your own pace. Harvest berries, care for animals, or simply enjoy the beautiful scenery and discover the magic hidden in every corner.

  • Daily Events – Your shop is a hub of life and wonder. As the days pass, creatures will stop by with stories, gifts, or even magical blessings for your shop. Everyone you meet is here to help you grow and enjoy your cozy world.

  • Bounds Breaking Joy: Teddy’s Haven celebrates curiosity. And sometimes that means climbing too high, falling too far, or finding yourself under the map. Go ahead: break the bounds. Secret items and small surprises await those who wander a little too far from the intended path. It’s all part of the adventure.

  • Auto Saving – Take the game at your own pace, no more requirements of ending your day for your game to be saved.

  • Ongoing Development: Teddy’s Haven is in Early Access, with plans for new locations, minigames, world events, and more, the journey has only just begun.

Why Early Access?

As a solo developer, I’ve poured my heart into creating a world that feels magical and alive. Your support helps me grow the game and continue working on new content for years to come.

Join the Teddy’s Haven Discord to share your feedback, report bugs, and help shape the future of this cozy adventure.

name: 意识分裂开篇季
short_description: A sci-fi visual novel where you explore consciousness splitting through story choices and immersive dialogue, offering infinite replayable imagination.
detailed_description:
Mind Rift is a sci-fi visual novel where you follow your guide, Oni, to explore consciousness splitting in a multi-consciousness simulated world. This immersive journey lets you experience your consciousness scattering across different times and spaces through meaningful dialogue and choices that shape the story.

The game offers a concise story that’s both profound and replayable. Through conversations with Oni, you’ll shape the narrative and reflect on the nature of reality. The game encourages multiple playthroughs to uncover deeper meanings, providing endless room for imagination.

Key Features:

  • Shape the story with immersive choices and dialogue, revealing fragments of your consciousness.

  • A short story with infinite replayability, sparking imagination and deeper reflection.

Mind Rift is perfect for fans of story-driven and philosophical games, blending everyday warmth with heartfelt farewells. Join Oni to challenge your perception of reality and embark on this unforgettable adventure!

name: Stone Simulator – Just Be a Rock
short_description: Stone Simulator is a meditative idle game where you live as a rock enduring endless seasons and absurd events. Survive storms, unlock quirky achievements, and observe a serene, ever-changing world. Perfect for Zen-like relaxation or meme-worthy humor.
detailed_description:
Be a stone / rock / boulder. Do nothing. Just exist.

Relax, meditate, and watch the seasons change in the most peaceful simulator ever.

Ever wondered what it’s like to be a rock?

Become an unflinching stone in a serene, ever-changing world. Survive centuries of seasons, weather, and absurdly mundane adventures. Grow moss, collect bird poop, and question your existence—Stone Simulator is the Zen meditation you never knew you needed… or the most boring game ever. You decide!


Stone Simulator is a whimsical, meditative experience where you embrace the thrilling life of a literal rock. Observe the world passively as decades fly by, seasons shift, and nature (or chaos) unfolds around you.

Gameplay Highlights:

  • 🌦️ Seasons & Weather: Survive blizzards, summer heatwaves, autumn and spring rains.

  • 🕰️ Time Flies: Watch days, years, and centuries pass

  • 🏆 Absurd Achievements: Unlock meme-worthy trophies like "Existential Crisis" (do nothing for 3 years) and many other.

Why Be a Rock?

  • Zen Mode: Chill with calming ambient sounds and minimalist visuals.

  • Meme Fuel: Perfect for streamers craving irony or players who enjoy "so bad it’s good" humor.

  • Zero Skill Required: Your only job? Exist. (Seriously, you can’t even move.)

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese

name: Alongside
short_description: Tower defense strategy in a hand-drawn atmospheric style. The action of which takes place in a fairy-tale world inhabited by animals. To survive, you will need to tactically consider the placement of units, control the hero, using his abilities to fight off the invading hordes of evil.
detailed_description:
Brief introduction: The kingdom is under the threat of attack by hordes of evil. You and your units need to protect it from orcs, goblins and other monsters. Use a tactical approach to survive and win.

Gameplay: The Tower Defense Strategy game invites players to place fighters on the field, each of which has unique attacking or defensive abilities. You will be attacked by waves of enemies and the further you advance in the game, the greater the wave and the level of their strength. In later levels, players can acquire stronger units to counter armored enemies.
Each unit can only attack or defend on the track it is on. Gather food and use it to buy new units while maintaining game balance. Use the hero and his abilities to save the day in difficult times. If the monster reaches the end of the track a second time in a level, you will lose.

Visual style: The game is made in a 2D hand-drawn style. The world of the game is fabulous, inhabited by various animals. Weapons and other elements used in the game will be created in the same atmosphere, which will give the game a unique visual look.
The game is suitable for fans of the genre of strategy and tower defense. Also, the game will be interesting for those who love games in a fairy tale and fantasy world.

Game Ending: To complete the game, you need to defeat the final boss, which is located in the last level of the game.

Conclusion: Alongside is a fun game in which players must use their tactical skills to defend the kingdom from the consequences of horrific attacks. As you progress in the game, players will gain new levels and unique heroes with unique abilities.

name: 3D Train Studio V9
short_description: Create your own miniature world as a model railroad with tracks from popular manufacturers or as a realistic railroad simulation - in 3D!
detailed_description:
Create your own miniature world!

3D Train Studio allows you to plan and design miniature worlds on your own PC in a simple and fun way.

Whether it's a model railroad with tracks from popular manufacturers or a realistic railroad simulation, 3D Train Studio unites all the tools you need, under a modern and intuitive user interface.

Plan

3D Train Studio supports you in a simple way in planning a realistic railroad simulation. Construct your layouts with thousands of tracks in all common gauges, true to detail and scale.

Build

Create a landscape of mountains and valleys, place houses and trees along roads and bring your own miniature world to life - with modern 3D graphics and in real time.

Simulate

Enter the virtual railroad and playfully simulate a complete railroad operation, including animated barriers, signals or road vehicles, automatically or through custom defined events.

All features

3D Train Studio contains over 2000 different tracks from well-known manufacturers in all common gauges, which can be used to plan classic indoor layouts, garden railroads, brick style railroads or even real track constructions.

  • Terrain design- Designing the landscape with mountains, valleys, waters, vegetation and more.

  • Rolling stock - Numerous locomotives, wagons, cars and other vehicles from different eras.

  • Online catalog - Parts catalog with access to thousands of additional models, contributed by the community.

  • Real-time - Real-time planning and simulation, from different 2D and 3D perspectives.

  • Railroad operations - Support of track blocks and routes to ensure realistic railroad operations.

  • Automation - Event-driven automation of all processes with the support of the Lua scripting language.

  • API - Programming interface (API) for connecting external programs, such as Rocrail.

name: Click To Continue
short_description: A strange white room. One button. Endless clicking. Unlock bizarre upgrades, face unexpected challenges, and uncover a hidden truth in this surreal, humorous, short clicker game.
detailed_description:
A button.
A white room.

You awaken to an empty, pristine space. At its center stands a single button.

There’s no explanation, no instructions—just the quiet certainty that pressing it is the only way forward.

What does it do?
Where will it lead?
There’s only one way to find out.

Each press peels back the layers of this strange experiment, unlocking surprises, upgrades, and… stranger things.

Is there a purpose behind it all? Or are you simply pressing because there’s nothing else to do?

In this white room, only one truth remains: the button must be pressed.

Key Features

  • A decremental game - Because increasing numbers are overrated. Watch numbers go down instead!

  • Press to Progress – The button must be pressed. The rest is... out of your hands.

  • Uncover What's Inside – Each panel opens with enough clicks, revealing upgrades, surprises, or pure nonsense.

  • Mystery Meets Absurdity – A bizarre world full of surprises, humor, and existential clicking.

  • Hacking for Clicks – A terminal lets you manipulate systems…

  • Music by Seth_Makes_Songs.

name: DRACOMATON
short_description: Dracomaton is a top-down roguelike bullet hell about Eclipse, a small robot who awakens in an abandoned factory filled with corrupted training bots and the secrets of cosmic dragons. Fight your way to the top of the tower by transforming your robot body, changing your entire arsenal on the fly!
detailed_description:
Dracomaton is a top-down roguelike bullet hell where you swap between multiple playstyles on the fly. Equip yourself with various Forms that have different strengths and weaknesses, OR Mod existing Forms with the characteristics of other ones!

  • A fast-paced, single-player experience built for interesting replayability

  • 16 unique Forms with 3 potential Mod versions each

  • Over 30+ build-influencing items, including several game-changing Chaos items

  • 3 tough bosses (shoutouts to Reggie the Run-killer)

  • Many secrets to uncover about the factory, the dragons, and the world beyond

With simple mouse-and-keyboard controls and controller compatibility, stack Forms and Items and mods until the bullets blur the screen, and try and try and try again to reach the very end.

And then, they awaken

name: Kitchen Wars
short_description: Kitchen Wars is a fast-paced party game with 2-8 players that plunges players into the chaos of a restaurant, where they must engage in strategic fights and theft while serving their customers.
detailed_description:
Kitchen Wars is an action-packed game where players of 1-8 players aim to sabotage each other’s restaurants while keeping their customers satisfied.

Use weapons, steal chairs, throw items, level up to unlock boosters, and have a blast!

  • Serve Your Clients: Deliver meals quickly to keep customers happy and satisfied.

  • Purchase Upgrades and Items: Enhance your kitchen and unlock powerful boosters.

  • Attack the Opposing Restaurant: Disrupt your rivals with strategic attacks and sabotage.

  • Steal Chairs: Reduce your competitor’s seating capacity by swiping their chairs.

  • Upgrade Your Restaurant: Earn money from happy clients to invest in your kitchen and secure victory.

  • Local Multiplayer

  • Online Multiplayer

  • Steam Remote Play

Whether you're focused on improving your restaurant or causing chaos for your opponents, Kitchen Wars offers a blend of strategy, combat, and humor for an entertaining and competitive experience.

  • Upgrade Your Restaurant: Earn money from happy clients to invest in your kitchen and secure victory.

  • Local Multiplayer

  • Online Multiplayer

  • Steam Remote Play

Whether you're focused on improving your restaurant or causing chaos for your opponents, Kitchen Wars offers a blend of strategy, combat, and humor for an entertaining and competitive experience.
supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Czech, Polish, Romanian, Thai, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support

name: Doodle Empires
short_description: Doodle Empires is an alternate history sandbox game all about drawing your own nations with your own histories and stories in a variety of maps. Watch your world take shape and evolve over time, and decide which nations will rise and which nations will fall.
detailed_description:
Doodle Empires is an alternate history sandbox game all about drawing your own nations with your own histories and stories in a variety of maps. Watch your world take shape and evolve over time, and decide which nations will rise and which nations will fall. 

How to play:

1. Create your first nation by selecting a border color and typing up a name

2. Draw the borders of your new nation onto the map, while paying attention to how much drawing power you have left at the top

3. Once out of drawing power, click a nation to open the nation inspector, and hit the select button.

4. Draw a new card on the top right, which will allow you to alter the selected nation further

5. Repeat

Card Types:

  • EXPAND: There are three expand card types, which are small, medium and large expand, and they allow you to grow the borders of your selected nation. 

NOTE: Expanding into unclaimed territory will be much cheaper than trying to expand into the land of other nations

  • SPLIT: There are two split card types, which are the regular split and the small split, and both will cause you to carve out a new nation out of a portion of whatever nation you selected bfore drawing the card

  • UNION: The union card allows your selected nation to fully annex another nation as if part of a royal union or similar treaty

  • NEW NATION: The new nation card will allow you to create a new nation just as you did at the start of the game, which will allow you to make a whole new Origin Group

  • NEW LEADER: The new leader card will switch out the currently selected nation's leader with a new one with new traits, which will affect how that nation expands its territory

  • BUILD CASTLE: The build castle card allows players to place and name a castle into the territory of the selected nation, which will then protect the tiles surrounding the castle, and thus make it more costly for other nations to take it

  • FOUND/ADOPT RELIGION: These cards will allow you to create new faiths, or adopt an already existing faith.

  • DIVERGE ORIGIN: This card will create a whole new origin from the selected nation

  • AGE CARDS: The age of conquest, division and unity cards will all make different cards more common over a period of time

Map Modes:

  • Political Mode: This mode allows players to see the borders of all nations on the map

  • Origin Mode: This mode allows players to see the original nation each nation split off from. Think of it as a sort of culture group map. NOTE: A nation's origin can also be seen in its nation inspector

  • Faith Mode: This mode allows players to see what tiles are part of what faith

  • Fort Mode: This mode allows players to see what tiles are currently protected by castles, and therefore more difficult to expand into

What's Next?

Doodle Empires is still early in development, and there is a lot I still want to add and expand on

Future mechanics and updates I'd like to add include:

  • Creating tribes, which can migrate and eventually settle

  • Disaster cards that will cause nations to lose land to the wilderness

  • A lot of quality of life additions such as, map sizes, list of dead nations, UI design, music/sound, etc.

  • Much more to come

Much like the nations in Doodle Empires, this list is subject to grow and change over time as I continue development, but should give you an idea of what I hope to build here.

Credits/About and Thanks

My name is Tanner/TanTan, and I'm working on this project on my own. I've been playing historical map strategy games since I was in middle school, and would occasionally like to draw on maps using the paint app on my computer. I've seen people similarly do the same using a spinning wheel with names of countries, events that happen, etc. That gave me the idea that instead of just winging it on paint like we've been doing I could make it into a real game with a bunch of possibilities and the freedom to make the world you like with some added randomness from drawing cards.  Anyway, thank you to anyone who decides to try my game, and follow my progress as I continue to develop Doodle Empires into a full game

name: Zenith Drift
short_description: High risk and online drift races in Zenith Drift. Make a difference with car customization. Show your skill in the arena requiring perfect maneuver and speed. Online racing, modding, and style combined. Dominate the asphalt!
detailed_description:
It’s a brand new online competitive platform that combines the adrenaline of high speed with the technical mastery of flawless drift maneuvers. Prove your skills against the most talented drivers from around the world

From legendary classic tracks to the most powerful modern sports beasts, a massive collection awaits you

Change your car’s color anytime, anywhere in game without spending credits. Save your favorite colors

Burn your tires across diverse environments, each with its own unique weather and atmosphere.

Experience a next-generation online racing adventure that blends the adrenaline rush of high speed with the technical mastery of flawless drift maneuvers. In this game, only the boldest and most skilled drivers can reach the top prove your abilities against competitors from around the world. With realistic simulation and detailed car customization, create your own driving style and leave your mark on the asphalt!

Welcome to Zenith Drift.
